title: Sabrina Carpenter Licking Lips
about: Sabrina Carpenter Licking Lips or Sabrina Carpenter Tongue Out is a reaction image of musical artist Sabrina Carpenter licking her lips while watching Bad Bunny receive his award for "Album of the Year" at the 2026 Grammy Awards, coincidentally around the same time as the Bad Bunny Crying at the Grammys meme. The Grammys took place on February 2nd, 2026, and the reaction image went viral over the following days. It is often used to express attraction to someone or something.
origin: On February 2nd, 2026, the 2026 Grammy Awards took place. Musical artist Bad Bunny won "Album of the Year." As he accepted his award, the camera showed the other nominees' reactions, including Sabrina Carpenter, who is seen applauding. At one point, she licks her top lip. The clip was posted online that day, including by the camswildestdreams Instagram [1] page, garnering over 24,000 likes in three days.
